'''''Star Wars Tales''''',<ref name="Disney Plus collection">{{DisneyPlus|url=browse/page-228f4aa0-0c43-4fd3-96a4-58c97841879d|text=Star Wars Tales}}</ref> also simply known as '''''Tales''''',<ref name="Disneypress">{{DisneyPlus|subdomain=press|url=news/disney-plus-star-wars-tales-of-the-empire-trailier-and-key-art|text=Disney+ Unveils Trailer & Key Art for "''Star Wars'': Tales of the Empire"}}</ref><ref name="Underworld Announced" /> is a series of animated anthology shorts that each covers characters from different factions in the [[Star Wars]] [[Universe]]. [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (television series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']], the first season, was released on [[October 26]], [[2022]]. ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Empire]]'', the second season, premiered on [[May 4]], [[2024]]. ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Underworld]]'', the third season, premiered on May 4, [[2025]]. Shortly after ''Underworld''{{'s}} release, Disney+ created a ''Star Wars Tales'' collection featuring the three series.<ref name="Disney Plus collection" />
